'''鈭歜-ch-zh-dh''' ('''kabachzhedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chastize|chastize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-zh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chastize|chastize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-ch-zh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kabachzhedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibachzhedhoko|thibachzhedhoko]] || [[word:jibachzhedhoko|jibachzhedhoko]] || [[word:shibachzhedhoko|shibachzhedhoko]] || [[word:kibachzhedhoko|kibachzhedhoko]]
